Howdy Guys, 

A quick test on my tinderbox, 

conky self fails to build on 6.X and conky-awesome fails to patch: 

http://32bit.miwibox.org/index.php?action=describe_port&id=1772 
http://32bit.miwibox.org/index.php?action=describe_port&id=1773 

please fix these both and send a attachment patch to me directly. 
Thanks
